final:
module sram_cell (
    input wire d,
    input wire we,
    input wire clk,
    output reg q
);
  wire _tap_d = d & {1{1'b1}};

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            q <= d;  // Write operation
        end
        // else no action, hold the current value
    end
endmodule
